Wiki7TelegramChatId.description: Telegram chat / channel / group ID to dispatch review-gate notifications to. Empty string disables Telegram dispatch (in-wiki Echo notifications still fire).

Wiki7TelegramBotName.description: Display name used when constructing Telegram message URLs back to the wiki. Defaults to 'Wiki7Bot' to match the MediaWiki bot account.

Wiki7ReviewGateNotifyOnGroups.description: User groups whose page saves trigger a review-gate notification. The bot's account ('Wiki7Bot') is in the 'bot' group; any other group listed here will also produce notifications when its members save pages in NS_DRAFT or against an approved-revs-gated page.
